hypothesis: Delivery-marketplace-only accounts deserve a stronger fit bonus (+30 instead of +15) because commission pressure (15-30% per order) is as real a pain point as call-dependency.
decision: Ship Model A as-is. 6/65 leads' absolute scores did move when the delivery bonus went from +15 to +30, but the shift was uniform within that group and never crossed another lead's score band — rank order came out fully invariant (10/10 top-10 overlap, 1.00 rank correlation). The delivery-commission hypothesis may still be true, but this scoring model isn't the right place to encode it — a flat bonus this size doesn't change who gets called first. Not worth the added complexity for this dataset.
